sections.paragraph:
an unused root, kindred to שָׁמַט which see.-

(1) to thrust, to cast, spec. to put an enemy to flight (den Feind werfen), whence שִׁמְצָה.

(2) to hasten (from the idea of putting to flight), especially in speaking, to speak hastily, compare شُمَاصُ hastening, شَمَصُ to speak hastily. Hence-
